description.en: An optional string representing a hint given to the browser on how it should prioritize fetching of the image relative to other images. If this value is provided, it must be one of the possible permitted values:highto fetch at a high priority,lowto fetch at a low priority, orautoto indicate no preference (which is the default).

description.en: An optional string representing a hint given to the browser on how it should prioritize fetching of a preload relative to other resources of the same type. description.en: An optional string representing a hint given to the browser on how it should prioritize fetching of an external script relative to other external scripts. If this value is provided, it must be one of the possible permitted values:highto fetch at a high priority,lowto fetch at a low priority, orautoto indicate no preference (which is the default). It reflects thefetchpriorityattribute of the<script>element.
